APPEARANCE: Alexis S. McKenna, Esq. of Winer, McKenna & Davis, LLP 510/433-1000 for pltf & opposing party; Robert G. Hulteng, Esq. of Littler Mendelson 433-1940 for deft & moving party Royal Motors; Allyson C. Massimino, Esq. of Chapman & Intrieri, L.L.P. 310/540-7883 for deft & moving party Mark Heer.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. NO SUBSTANTIVE UNCONSCIONABILITY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (301/PJB/DS) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT ANDERSON ENTERPRISES DBA ROYAL MOTORS' Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings was continued to June 13, 2006 per agreement of parties. (301/JLW) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.
